Introducing the Ruby Royale Sterling Silver Mangalsutra, a mangalsutra where 925 sterling silver meets a bright, rhodium-polished shine for a look that's polished without trying too hard.

Design Story

It's a small departure from the expected: a mangalsutra built around a rich ruby centrepiece, but grounded enough to wear with almost anything.

Key Features

  • Crafted in 925 sterling silver
  • Finished with a bright, rhodium-polished shine
  • Set with a rich ruby centrepiece
  • A versatile design suited to both men's and women's styling
  • Versatile enough for everyday, festive, office, party and wedding

Styling Suggestions

Reach for the Ruby Royale Sterling Silver Mangalsutra on the days that call for a little more ceremony — think wedding functions, receptions, and the outfits you've planned for weeks.

Care Instructions

Maintain its brilliance by avoiding direct contact with harsh chemicals, lotions, and perfumes. Store gently in the provided AG Elements pouch when not in use.

Why AG Elements

At AG Elements, we bridge the gap between traditional craftsmanship and contemporary style. Every piece is a testament to our commitment to quality, ensuring you wear jewelry that truly stands out.
